summary: Iteration 9 testing completed. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified all requested features: admin/agent login, role-based panel access, logo/hero configuration, public forms, and Leaflet map integration.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with admin/admin123 returns access_token and user info
Backend: Agent login with agente1/agente123 returns access_token and user info
Backend: Agent cannot access /api/users (returns 403)
Backend: Agent cannot create users (returns 403)
Backend: Agent can update own profile via PUT /api/users/{id}/profile
Backend: Agency settings has logo_position field
Backend: Logo position can be updated
Backend: Agency settings has hero_images array
Backend: Agency settings has hero_video_url field
Backend: Hero video URL can be updated
Backend: Contact form submission works (POST /api/contact)
Backend: Sell request form submission works (POST /api/sell-requests)
Backend: Job application form submission works (POST /api/job-applications)
Backend: Upload endpoint exists and validates input
Frontend: Homepage loads with logo in header
Frontend: Floating logo visible in hero section (top-left position)
Frontend: Admin login page shows logo
Frontend: Admin panel shows all 9 tabs for admin user (Resumen, Marca y Logo, Estilo, Ubicaciones, Propiedades, Mensajes, Ventas, Empleo, Usuarios)
Frontend: Admin panel header shows logo
Frontend: Marca y Logo tab has Upload Logo button
Frontend: Marca y Logo tab has Logo Position selector with 9 positions
Frontend: Marca y Logo tab has Hero Images upload section
Frontend: Marca y Logo tab has Hero Video URL input
Frontend: Agent login works with agente1/agente123
Frontend: Agent panel shows 'Panel de Agente' header
Frontend: Agent panel shows welcome banner with property count
Frontend: Agent panel only shows Propiedades and Mi Perfil tabs
Frontend: Agent panel hides all admin-only tabs (Resumen, Marca y Logo, Estilo, Ubicaciones, Mensajes, Ventas, Empleo, Usuarios)
Frontend: Agent Mi Perfil tab shows Nombre Completo field
Frontend: Agent Mi Perfil tab shows Teléfono WhatsApp field
Frontend: Agent Mi Perfil tab shows Cambiar Foto button
Frontend: Agent Mi Perfil tab shows Guardar Cambios button
Frontend: Contact page form has all required fields (name, email, phone, message)
Frontend: Vende tu Propiedad page form has all required fields
Frontend: Trabaja con Nosotros page form has all required fields
Frontend: Property detail page shows Leaflet map with OpenStreetMap tiles
Frontend: Leaflet map shows property marker with popup
seed_data_creation: Created agente1 user if not exists for agent login testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 9 verified working: 1) Admin login with admin/admin123 works. 2) Agent login with agente1/agente123 works. 3) Admin panel shows all 9 tabs. 4) Agent panel only shows Propiedades and Mi Perfil tabs - all admin-only tabs correctly hidden. 5) Logo upload and hero configuration in Marca y Logo tab working. 6) Logo position selector has 9 positions (top-left, top-center, top-right, center-left, center, center-right, bottom-left, bottom-center, bottom-right). 7) All public forms (Contact, Vende tu Propiedad, Trabaja con Nosotros) working. 8) Leaflet map with OpenStreetMap integration working on property detail pages. 9) Logo visible in header, login page, and admin panel.

features_verified.admin_panel_tabs: VERIFIED - All 9 tabs visible for admin
features_verified.agent_panel_restrictions: VERIFIED - Only Propiedades and Mi Perfil tabs visible
features_verified.logo_upload: VERIFIED - Upload Logo button in Marca y Logo tab
features_verified.hero_config: VERIFIED - Hero images and video URL configurable
features_verified.contact_form: VERIFIED - Form works and submits to API
features_verified.sell_request_form: VERIFIED - Vende tu Propiedad form works
features_verified.job_application_form: VERIFIED - Trabaja con Nosotros form works
features_verified.leaflet_map: VERIFIED - Interactive map on property detail pages
features_verified.agent_profile_edit: VERIFIED - Agent can edit own profile in Mi Perfil tab
features_verified.logo_visibility: VERIFIED - Logo visible in header, login, and admin panel
